name: DrunkGD
description: A mod for Geometry dash using the geode SDK that slightly speeds up and slows down your game.

info.name: Drunk Settings
info.description: Configure the randomized speed drift effect.

enabled.name: Enable Effect
enabled.description: Whether the randomized speed drift effect is active during gameplay.

intensity.name: Intensity
intensity.description: How far the game speed can drift from normal.

min-interval.name: Min Interval
min-interval.description: The fastest the speed can re-randomize, in seconds.

max-interval.name: Max Interval
max-interval.description: The slowest the speed can re-randomize, in seconds.
